description: Current vehicle speed measured by the speedometer. Represents the instantaneous speed of the vehicle.
Longitudinal acceleration of the vehicle. Positive values indicate forward acceleration, negative values indicate braking.
Lateral acceleration of the vehicle during cornering. Positive values indicate right turn, negative values indicate left turn.
Tire pressure for the front left wheel. Measured in kilopascals for accurate pressure monitoring.
Tire pressure for the front right wheel. Critical for vehicle safety and fuel efficiency.
Tire pressure for the rear left wheel. Maintains optimal contact with road surface.
Tire pressure for the rear right wheel. Essential for balanced vehicle handling.
Current state of charge of the traction battery. Indicates remaining battery capacity as a percentage.
Estimated remaining range for electric vehicles. Calculated based on current battery charge and driving conditions.
Brake pedal position as a percentage. Zero indicates no braking, 100 indicates full brake application.
Accelerator pedal position as a percentage. Zero indicates no throttle, 100 indicates full throttle.
Steering wheel angle in degrees. Positive values indicate right turn, negative values indicate left turn.
Current gear position of the transmission. -1 indicates reverse, 0 indicates neutral, positive values indicate forward gears.
Temperature of the electric motor. Critical for monitoring motor health and preventing overheating.
Engine coolant temperature for combustion engines. Indicates the operating temperature of the cooling system.
Ambient air temperature outside the vehicle. Used for climate control and driver information.
Indicates whether high beam headlights are currently active. True when high beams are on, false otherwise.
Indicates whether brake lights are currently illuminated. Activated when brake pedal is pressed.
Current engine load as a percentage. Indicates how hard the engine is working relative to maximum capacity.
Throttle valve position as a percentage. Directly correlates with air intake and engine power output.
Indicates whether the traction battery is currently charging. True when connected to charging station.
Current charging rate in kilowatts. Indicates the power being delivered to the battery during charging.
Indicates whether the parking brake is engaged. True when parking brake is active.
Indicates whether the driver's seatbelt is fastened. Critical safety indicator for vehicle operation.
Indicates whether cruise control is currently active. True when cruise control is maintaining set speed.
Target speed set for cruise control system. Represents the speed the vehicle will maintain automatically.
Average temperature of the traction battery pack. Critical for battery health and performance monitoring.
Rotational speed of the front left wheel. Used for traction control and ABS systems.
Current fuel level as a percentage of tank capacity. Indicates remaining fuel for combustion engine vehicles.
Estimated time remaining to complete battery charging. Calculated based on current charge rate and target charge level.
